title: Development Update & Future Plans
contents_preview: Hey everyone,Today, we’d like to share our current development progress and future plans for Give Us A Sign.Our goal is not simply to create another ghost hunting game, but to deliver a deeper, more atmospheric, and highly replayable paranormal investigation experience.
